requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Senegal / West Africa)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/最低能效准入（MEPS）——家用制冷器具（塞内加尔/西非）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/最低能效准入（MEPS）——家用製冷器具（塞內加爾/西非）

summary.en: Senegal, through ASN and within the ECOWAS regional energy-efficiency framework （ECOWAS Centre for Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency, ECREEE）, has been rolling out minimum energy performance standards （MEPS） and energy labelling for cooling appliances, including household refrigerators, to curb energy consumption and phase out inefficient imports. Where in force, the regime sets a minimum energy-efficiency threshold （MEPS） that imported refrigerators must meet, with the energy-performance test method based on the IEC 62552 series （adopted as NS）. The energy-performance baseline is therefore international-standard-based rather than identical to any single jurisdiction. Manufacturers should confirm, for the specific model and import date, whether a MEPS threshold and/or energy-label obligation applies at the point of import, since the West-African/ECOWAS regional regime is being phased in and national implementation timing varies.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔通过ASN并在西非经共体（ECOWAS）区域能效框架（西非经共体可再生能源与能效中心，ECREEE）内，一直在推行制冷器具（包括家用电冰箱）的最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效标识，以抑制能耗并淘汰低效进口产品。在生效区域，该制度设定进口电冰箱须达到的最低能效门槛（MEPS），能效检测方法基于IEC 62552系列（采纳为NS）。因此能效基准以国际标准为基础，而非与任何单一法域完全一致。制造商应针对具体型号及进口日期确认，进口时是否适用MEPS门槛及/或能效标识义务，因为西非/经共体区域制度正在分阶段推行，各国实施时间不一。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾通過ASN並在西非經共體（ECOWAS）區域能效框架（西非經共體可再生能源與能效中心，ECREEE）內，一直在推行製冷器具（包括家用電冰箱）的最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效標識，以抑制能耗並淘汰低效進口產品。在生效區域，該制度設定進口電冰箱須達到的最低能效門檻（MEPS），能效檢測方法基於IEC 62552系列（採納為NS）。因此能效基準以國際標準為基礎，而非與任何單一法域完全一致。製造商應針對具體型號及進口日期確認，進口時是否適用MEPS門檻及/或能效標識義務，因為西非/經共體區域制度正在分階段推行，各國實施時間不一。

standards_or_laws: ECOWAS / ECREEE regional minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and labelling framework for cooling appliances (refrigerators) — phased national implementation via ASN
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (adopted as NS; basis for energy-performance measurement)
ASN (Association Senegalaise de Normalisation) — adoption of NS energy standards and any national energy-label scheme

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 （Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators）, establishing grades （Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold） and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory （GB）, enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR measures; the test method aligns with the IEC 62552 series via GB/T 8059. Because Senegal's emerging MEPS also references the IEC 62552 series for measurement, the test methodology is broadly compatible, but the Chinese grade thresholds and label format differ from any Senegalese/ECOWAS MEPS thresholds — a Chinese grade does not automatically equal Senegalese MEPS compliance.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性（GB），由SAMR执行，中国能效标识依NDRC/SAMR办法管理；检测方法通过GB/T 8059与IEC 62552系列对齐。由于塞内加尔正在形成的MEPS同样以IEC 62552系列作为测量依据，检测方法大体兼容，但中国等级门槛及标识格式不同于任何塞内加尔/经共体MEPS门槛——中国等级不自动等同于塞内加尔MEPS合规。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性（GB），由SAMR執行，中國能效標識依NDRC/SAMR辦法管理；檢測方法通過GB/T 8059與IEC 62552系列對齊。由於塞內加爾正在形成的MEPS同樣以IEC 62552系列作為測量依據，檢測方法大體兼容，但中國等級門檻及標識格式不同於任何塞內加爾/經共體MEPS門檻——中國等級不自動等同於塞內加爾MEPS合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test method (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two practical gaps where a MEPS/label regime applies: （1） Threshold recalculation — a Chinese Grade 1/Grade 2 rating does not guarantee compliance with a Senegalese/ECOWAS MEPS threshold; energy performance must be evaluated against the applicable Senegalese MEPS limit using IEC 62552-series measurement. The test methodology is broadly compatible （both reference IEC 62552）, easing data re-use, but the pass/fail threshold differs. （2） Label format — where a Senegalese/ECOWAS energy label is required, the Chinese Energy Label （CEL, 1-to-5 grade） cannot serve as the local label; the local label format and French-language content must be used. Unlike the EU there is no central pre-registration database （no EPREL equivalent）. Because the regional regime is phased, manufacturers must confirm the in-force status for the specific model and import date with ASN / the importer. [NOTE: The exact Senegalese refrigerator MEPS threshold and label-format requirement, and whether they are mandatory at the import date, should be confirmed with ASN and the conformity-assessment body before submission.]
gap.zh: 在适用MEPS/标识制度时存在两项实务差距：（1）门槛重新核算——中国1级/2级评定不保证符合塞内加尔/经共体MEPS门槛；须使用IEC 62552系列测量，对照适用的塞内加尔MEPS限值评估能效。检测方法大体兼容（均参照IEC 62552），便于数据复用，但合格/不合格门槛不同。（2）标识格式——在须使用塞内加尔/经共体能效标识时，中国能效标识（CEL，1至5级）不能充当本地标识；须使用本地标识格式及法语内容。与欧盟不同，无中央预注册数据库（无EPREL等效）。由于区域制度分阶段推行，制造商须就具体型号及进口日期向ASN/进口商确认生效状态。【注：应在提交前向ASN及合格评定机构确认塞内加尔电冰箱具体MEPS门槛及标识格式要求，以及其在进口日期是否为强制。】
gap.zht: 在適用MEPS/標識制度時存在兩項實務差距：（1）門檻重新核算——中國1級/2級評定不保證符合塞內加爾/經共體MEPS門檻；須使用IEC 62552系列測量，對照適用的塞內加爾MEPS限值評估能效。檢測方法大體兼容（均參照IEC 62552），便於數據複用，但合格/不合格門檻不同。（2）標識格式——在須使用塞內加爾/經共體能效標識時，中國能效標識（CEL，1至5級）不能充當本地標識；須使用本地標識格式及法語內容。與歐盟不同，無中央預登記數據庫（無EPREL等效）。由於區域制度分階段推行，製造商須就具體型號及進口日期向ASN/進口商確認生效狀態。【注：應在提交前向ASN及合格評定機構確認塞內加爾電冰箱具體MEPS門檻及標識格式要求，以及其在進口日期是否為強制。】

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / phased — minimum energy performance (MEPS) and energy labelling for refrigerators are being rolled out via ECOWAS/ECREEE and ASN; confirm in-force status, threshold, and label obligation for the specific model and import date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: ECOWAS Centre for Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency (ECREEE) / ASN

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal is phasing in MEPS and energy labelling for refrigerators via the ECOWAS/ECREEE regional framework, with measurement based on the IEC 62552 series (adopted as NS). A Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not automatically equal Senegalese MEPS compliance, though the shared IEC 62552 test basis eases data re-use. There is no EPREL-style central registry. Confirm the in-force MEPS threshold and label-format obligation for the specific model and import date with ASN and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔正通过ECOWAS/ECREEE区域框架分阶段推行电冰箱的MEPS及能效标识，测量基于IEC 62552系列（采纳为NS）。中国GB 12021.2等级不自动等同于塞内加尔MEPS合规，但共用的IEC 62552检测基础便于数据复用。无EPREL式的中央注册库。须就具体型号及进口日期向ASN及进口商确认生效的MEPS门槛及标识格式义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾正通過ECOWAS/ECREEE區域框架分階段推行電冰箱的MEPS及能效標識，測量基於IEC 62552系列（採納為NS）。中國GB 12021.2等級不自動等同於塞內加爾MEPS合規，但共用的IEC 62552檢測基礎便於數據複用。無EPREL式的中央註冊庫。須就具體型號及進口日期向ASN及進口商確認生效的MEPS門檻及標識格式義務。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label — Display and French-Language Content (Senegal)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——展示及法语内容（塞内加尔）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——展示及法語內容（塞內加爾）

summary.en: Where a Senegalese / ECOWAS energy label applies to household refrigerators, the appliance must bear the prescribed local energy label displaying the energy-efficiency class/rating, annual energy consumption （kWh/annum）, and model identifier, with content in French for the Senegalese market. The label scheme is administered nationally via ASN within the regional ECOWAS/ECREEE framework, and unlike the EU there is no central product pre-registration database （no EPREL equivalent）: the supplier/importer self-declares the energy rating based on testing to the IEC 62552 series and applies the prescribed label. Dealers display the label at point of sale. Confirm the precise label graphic, rating scale, and any registration/notification step with ASN for the specific model and import date.
summary.zh: 在塞内加尔/经共体能效标识适用于家用电冰箱时，器具须附贴规定的本地能效标识，标注能效等级/评级、年耗电量（千瓦时/年）及型号标识符，内容须为面向塞内加尔市场的法语。该标识方案在区域ECOWAS/ECREEE框架内由ASN在国家层面管理，且与欧盟不同，无中央产品预注册数据库（无EPREL等效）：供应商/进口商依据IEC 62552系列检测自我声明能效评级并加贴规定标识。经销商在销售点展示标识。须就具体型号及进口日期向ASN确认确切的标识图形、评级标度及任何注册/备案步骤。
summary.zht: 在塞內加爾/經共體能效標識適用於家用電冰箱時，器具須附貼規定的本地能效標識，標注能效等級/評級、年耗電量（千瓦時/年）及型號識別符，內容須為面向塞內加爾市場的法語。該標識方案在區域ECOWAS/ECREEE框架內由ASN在國家層面管理，且與歐盟不同，無中央產品預登記數據庫（無EPREL等效）：供應商/進口商依據IEC 62552系列檢測自我聲明能效評級並加貼規定標識。經銷商在銷售點展示標識。須就具體型號及進口日期向ASN確認確切的標識圖形、評級標度及任何登記/備案步驟。

standards_or_laws: ECOWAS / ECREEE regional energy-labelling framework for refrigerators — national implementation via ASN (label graphic, rating scale, French-language content)
IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for the energy rating shown on the label (adopted as NS)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label （CEL） system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision）, displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale （1 highest, 5 minimum threshold） and annual energy consumption, administered via the China National Institute of Standardization （CNIS）. There is no pre-registration database; manufacturers self-declare grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The Chinese CEL graphic, 1-to-5 scale, and Chinese-language content differ from any Senegalese/ECOWAS local label and French-language requirement, so the CEL cannot serve as the local label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）实施的中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。无预注册数据库；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。中国CEL图形、1至5级标度及中文内容不同于任何塞内加尔/经共体本地标识及法语要求，故CEL不能充当本地标识。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）實施的中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。無預登記數據庫；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。中國CEL圖形、1至5級標度及中文內容不同於任何塞內加爾/經共體本地標識及法語要求，故CEL不能充當本地標識。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Where a label applies, the gap is format and language, not a central-registry obligation: （1） the Chinese CEL （1-to-5 grade, Chinese text） cannot be used; the prescribed Senegalese/ECOWAS label graphic with French-language content must be applied based on an IEC 62552-series-derived rating; （2） unlike the EU, there is no EPREL-style pre-registration to complete, though ASN may operate a national notification or label-authorisation step — confirm whether any registration/notification applies; （3） the rating shown must correspond to the Senegalese MEPS/rating scale, not the Chinese grade, so a re-mapping from the GB 12021.2 grade to the local scale is needed. Because the underlying measurement standard is the shared IEC 62552 series, the test data is broadly re-usable, but the displayed rating and label artwork must be localised. Where no mandatory label is yet in force for the specific model/date, a French-language energy-information notice is still good practice for the market.
gap.zh: 在适用标识时，差距在于格式与语言，而非中央注册义务：（1）中国CEL（1至5级，中文）不能使用；须基于IEC 62552系列得出的评级，加贴规定的塞内加尔/经共体标识图形及法语内容；（2）与欧盟不同，无EPREL式预注册须完成，但ASN可能实行国家备案或标识授权步骤——须确认是否适用任何注册/备案；（3）所示评级须对应塞内加尔MEPS/评级标度，而非中国等级，故须将GB 12021.2等级重新映射至本地标度。由于底层测量标准为共用的IEC 62552系列，检测数据大体可复用，但所示评级及标识图案须本地化。在具体型号/日期尚无强制标识生效时，提供法语能效信息说明仍为该市场的良好做法。
gap.zht: 在適用標識時，差距在於格式與語言，而非中央註冊義務：（1）中國CEL（1至5級，中文）不能使用；須基於IEC 62552系列得出的評級，加貼規定的塞內加爾/經共體標識圖形及法語內容；（2）與歐盟不同，無EPREL式預登記須完成，但ASN可能實行國家備案或標識授權步驟——須確認是否適用任何登記/備案；（3）所示評級須對應塞內加爾MEPS/評級標度，而非中國等級，故須將GB 12021.2等級重新映射至本地標度。由於底層測量標準為共用的IEC 62552系列，檢測數據大體可複用，但所示評級及標識圖案須本地化。在具體型號/日期尚無強制標識生效時，提供法語能效資訊說明仍為該市場的良好做法。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / phased — local energy-label display required where the Senegalese/ECOWAS label scheme is in force for the product category; French-language content required; no EPREL-style central pre-registration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where a Senegalese/ECOWAS energy label applies, refrigerators must carry the prescribed local label with French-language content, based on an IEC 62552-series rating. The Chinese CEL (1-to-5 grade, Chinese text) cannot serve as the local label. Unlike the EU there is no EPREL-style central pre-registration, but confirm any ASN national notification/authorisation step and re-map the rating to the local scale for the specific model and import date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在适用塞内加尔/经共体能效标识时，电冰箱须附贴规定的本地标识并采用法语内容，基于IEC 62552系列评级。中国CEL（1至5级，中文）不能充当本地标识。与欧盟不同，无EPREL式中央预注册，但须确认ASN任何国家备案/授权步骤，并就具体型号及进口日期将评级重新映射至本地标度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在適用塞內加爾/經共體能效標識時，電冰箱須附貼規定的本地標識並採用法語內容，基於IEC 62552系列評級。中國CEL（1至5級，中文）不能充當本地標識。與歐盟不同，無EPREL式中央預登記，但須確認ASN任何國家備案/授權步驟，並就具體型號及進口日期將評級重新映射至本地標度。
